description: The party master for an external (or internal) vendor the organization buys from. Carries identity, currency and commercial terms, the qualification package (registration, COA, certifications, AVL scope/grade), and the cross-standard ISO attribute set (risk, security, continuity, sustainability, infosec, anti-bribery), each with assessment dates and evidence. Its lifecycle status gates RFQ award and PO issue: a supplier must be ONBOARDED to be orderable, and SUSPENDED blocks new POs.
lifecycleEnum: SupplierStatus (PENDING_ONBOARDING -> PENDING_APPROVAL -> ONBOARDED -> OFFBOARDED; plus ONBOARDED <-> SUSPENDED)

fields.name: code
fields.label: Supplier Code
fields.validation: configurable pattern S/##### (prefix + zero-padded counter, max+1); first S/00001; configurable prefix/width; immutable; natural key for bulk-import upsert
fields.purpose: Stable human-readable supplier key used as the natural key for bulk-import upsert (duplicates last-wins), printed on the PO, and carried into ERP sync and creditor-ledger postings; immutability is what makes supplier spend and performance traceable over time.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Supplier Name
fields.validation: required
fields.purpose: The legal/display name shown in dropdowns, on the PO PDF, and in scorecards; the human-facing identity behind the code.

fields.name: currency
fields.label: Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master (USD | OMR | SAR | AED | EUR | CHF | INR, configurable)
fields.purpose: The default transaction currency for orders and payments to this supplier; seeds the PO and quotation currency and drives FX normalization to base for spend analytics (axiom A12).

fields.name: dealCurrency
fields.label: Deal Currency
fields.validation: a configured currency master; defaults to the supplier currency
fields.purpose: Allows a negotiated/contracted currency that differs from the supplier default currency for specific deals; keeps the commercial currency explicit when it diverges from the master.

fields.name: classification
fields.label: Classification
fields.validation: one of the enum (Internal | External)
fields.purpose: Distinguishes internal (intercompany/group) suppliers from external third parties; affects whether the full external qualification/ISO gate applies and how spend is reported.

fields.name: groupId
fields.label: Supplier Group
fields.validation: a SupplierGroup master (natural key = name)
fields.purpose: Buckets the supplier into a commercial/category grouping used for consolidated spend reporting, group-level terms, and supplier-base analytics.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: PENDING_ONBOARDING -> PENDING_APPROVAL -> ONBOARDED -> OFFBOARDED (terminal), plus ONBOARDED <-> SUSPENDED; edit on ONBOARDED/PENDING_APPROVAL reverts to PENDING_APPROVAL; approve requires qualification complete
fields.purpose: The qualification lifecycle position that gates orderability: only ONBOARDED can be awarded an RFQ or issued a PO; SUSPENDED blocks new POs without offboarding; edit reverts to re-approval (axiom A10).

fields.name: paymentTerms
fields.label: Payment Terms
fields.validation: one of the enum (100% advance | part-advance + against documents | part-advance + against shipment | 30/70 | net 30 | net 60 | net 90)
fields.purpose: The default commercial payment terms for this supplier; seeds the PO/payment schedule and decides whether an advance is triggered at acknowledgement and which match path (advance vs net) applies.

fields.name: vendorRegistration
fields.label: Vendor Registration
fields.validation: onboarding/registration form completed by the supplier (email + OTP)
fields.purpose: The supplier's self-declared registration record that opens the qualification package; its presence is part of the approval gate to ONBOARDED (axiom A15 compliance is a hard eligibility gate).

fields.name: threeBatchCOA
fields.label: Three-Batch COA
fields.mandatoryCondition: OTC/pharma raw or packaging material supplier
fields.validation: three batches' Certificate of Analysis + samples
fields.purpose: Establishes batch-to-batch consistency for regulated (OTC/pharma) materials before approval; a hard qualification requirement for those categories and an auditor-inspected quality record.

fields.name: certifications
fields.label: Certifications
fields.mandatoryCondition: required certifications for the supplier category (cert gate)
fields.validation: array of {certType (ISO 9001 | ISO 14001 | ISO 45001 | ISO 22000/HACCP | GMP | other), certNumber, issuingBody, issueDate, expiryDate (mandatory), evidence}; expiry alerts on selection and >= 1 week before expiry
fields.purpose: Records the supplier's quality/safety certifications with expiry so certification validity can act as a hard pass/fail eligibility gate for the AVL (axiom A15), not a weighted score; an expired cert can drive ONBOARDED -> SUSPENDED.

fields.name: avlScopeOfApproval
fields.label: AVL Scope of Approval
fields.validation: the categories/items the supplier is approved to supply
fields.purpose: Bounds what the Approved Vendor List entry authorizes the supplier to supply so sourcing only invites and awards within the approved scope; an auditor checks awards against this scope.

fields.name: avlGrade
fields.label: AVL Grade
fields.validation: composite band A (>=90) | B (70-89) | C (<70), configurable; with AVL status Approved | Conditional | Preferred | Suspended | Disqualified
fields.purpose: The composite qualification grade that summarizes supplier capability and feeds the AVL status; sustained Grade A becomes Preferred and a failed band can drive Suspended/Disqualified, gating PO eligibility (axiom A11).

fields.name: riskTier
fields.label: Risk Tier (ISO 31000)
fields.mandatoryCondition: required ISO attributes populated for the supplier risk tier (approval gate)
fields.validation: one of the enum (low | medium | high | critical); carries lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence + expiry, CAPA log
fields.purpose: Classifies the supplier's inherent/residual risk (ISO 31000) so higher tiers require more ISO attributes and tighter re-assessment cadence; drives the risk-based depth of qualification and monitoring.

fields.name: securityTradeProgram
fields.label: Security Trade Program (ISO 28000)
fields.validation: one of the enum (none | C-TPAT | AEO | TAPA); carries cert# + expiry, lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence
fields.purpose: Records the supply-chain security trade-program accreditation (ISO 28000) used in security risk rating and customs/trade-facilitation treatment; an expired security cert can drive suspension.

fields.name: continuity
fields.label: Business Continuity (ISO 22301)
fields.validation: {criticalityFlag, bcPlan, lastTestDate, MTPD, RTO, MBCO, RPO, backupSupplierRegister, dualSourcingCoverage}; with lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence + expiry
fields.purpose: Captures the supplier's business-continuity posture (ISO 22301: maximum tolerable period of disruption, recovery time/point objectives, minimum business continuity objective, backup sourcing) so continuity risk is assessed and dual-sourcing gaps for critical suppliers are visible.

fields.name: sustainabilityESG
fields.label: Sustainability / ESG (ISO 20400)
fields.validation: {EcoVadis/CDP, ghgData, modernSlaveryStatement, codeOfConductSignoff, conflictMinerals}; with lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence + expiry
fields.purpose: Holds the supplier's sustainable-procurement and ESG attributes (ISO 20400) for responsible-sourcing assessment, modern-slavery and conflict-minerals compliance, and ESG spend reporting.

fields.name: iso14001
fields.label: Environmental Cert (ISO 14001)
fields.validation: {iso14001Status, scope}; with lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence + expiry
fields.purpose: Tracks the supplier's environmental-management-system certification (ISO 14001) with expiry as an environmental-compliance evidence item feeding the ESG assessment and the eligibility gate.

fields.name: infoSecDPA
fields.label: Information Security / DPA (ISO 27001)
fields.validation: {dataClassificationAccessed, securityCertStatus, dpaStatus, incidentLog, cloudAttestations (27017/27018/SOC2)}; with lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence + expiry
fields.purpose: Records the supplier's information-security certification and data-processing-agreement status (ISO 27001) for suppliers that handle data, so infosec risk and DPA coverage are assessed and an expired/absent DPA can gate eligibility.

fields.name: antiBriberyDDscreening
fields.label: Anti-Bribery Due Diligence / Screening (ISO 37001)
fields.validation: {briberyRiskRating, dueDiligenceStatus + date, beneficialOwnership/PEP/sanctions screening, antiBriberyClauseSignoff, reScreeningCadence, redFlagLog}; with lastAssessed, nextDue, evidence + expiry
fields.purpose: Holds the anti-bribery due-diligence and sanctions/PEP/beneficial-ownership screening (ISO 37001); a sanctions hit is a hard eligibility gate (axiom A15) that can drive ONBOARDED -> SUSPENDED and blocks new POs.

fields.name: isErpSynced
fields.label: ERP Synced
fields.validation: toggle only when status = ONBOARDED; reset to false on every edit
fields.purpose: Marks whether the ONBOARDED supplier master has been pushed across the ERP boundary; resetting on every edit (axiom A10) forces a re-sync after changes so the ERP never holds a stale unapproved record.

fields.name: minimumOrderValue
fields.label: Minimum Order Value
fields.validation: >= 0; in supplier currency
fields.purpose: The supplier's minimum order threshold used at PO drafting to warn/consolidate small orders so the buyer does not raise sub-economic POs.

fields.name: advancePayable
fields.label: Advance Payable
fields.validation: boolean
fields.purpose: Flags suppliers eligible for advance/down-payment so advance-bearing payment terms and the acknowledgement-time advance trigger are only available for approved suppliers.

fields.name: advanceTolerance
fields.label: Advance Tolerance
fields.validation: >= 0; percent or amount band on the advance
fields.purpose: The acceptable variance on the advance amount for this supplier so a within-band advance is accepted without a separate exception; bounds advance exposure.

fields.name: autoInvoicing
fields.label: Auto-Invoicing
fields.validation: boolean
fields.purpose: Marks suppliers for whom an invoice is generated automatically from the GRN/PO (evaluated-receipt-settlement style) rather than awaiting a supplier-submitted invoice, shortening the settlement cycle for trusted suppliers.

invariants: A10 edit on ONBOARDED/PENDING_APPROVAL reverts to PENDING_APPROVAL; ERP-sync flag resets on update; SUSPENDED blocks new POs without offboarding
A11 quality/compliance events (CAPA loop) drive AVL status which gates PO eligibility
A12 amounts normalized to base via FX for analytics
A13 audit (category SUPPLIER) + SSE on every change
A15 certification validity and document completeness are a hard eligibility gate for the AVL, not a weighted scorecard input
